title: Property Consultant - Runwal Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Runwal Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!
